debug: Add more tracing lines for indexer + fix mistyped field (#5871)
prompt nits

> [!IMPORTANT] > Remove polyfill and full client-side JS library, update OpenAPI parsing, and rename a component in the frontend. > > - **Dependencies**: > - Remove `vite-plugin-node-polyfills` and `@apidevtools/swagger-parser` from `package.json`. > - Add `@scalar/openapi-parser` to `package.json`. > - **Components**: > - Rename `HttpTriggersGenerator.svelte` to `RoutesGenerator.svelte`. > - Update references from `httpTriggersGenerator` to `routesGenerator` in `RoutesGenerator.svelte` and `+page.svelte`. > - **OpenAPI Parsing**: > - Replace `swagger-parser` with `@scalar/openapi-parser` in `utils.ts`. > - Update `parse()` function in `utils.ts` to use `validate` and `dereference` from `@scalar/openapi-parser`. > - **Misc**: > - Add error handling for empty OpenAPI paths in `RoutesGenerator.svelte`. > - Update `generateFolderPath()` in `utils.ts` to handle long summaries. > > This description was created by [](https://www.ellipsis.dev?ref=windmill-labs%2Fwindmill&utm_source=github&utm_medium=referral) for 45568ecc517dd64807d6935dbbd285b8d608d60c. You can [customize](https://app.ellipsis.dev/windmill-labs/settings/summaries) this summary. It will automatically update as commits are pushed.

> [!IMPORTANT] > Add functionality to generate HTTP route triggers from OpenAPI specifications, including backend endpoints and frontend UI components. > > - **Backend**: > - Add `/w/{workspace}/http_triggers/create_many` endpoint in `openapi.yaml` for creating multiple HTTP triggers. > - Refactor `http_triggers.rs` to support batch creation with `create_many_http_trigger()`. > - Introduce `HttpMethod` enum in `http_trigger_args.rs` for HTTP methods. > - **Frontend**: > - Add `HttpTriggersGenerator.svelte` for generating HTTP routes from OpenAPI specs. > - Update `package.json` to include `@apidevtools/swagger-parser` and `openapi-types`. > - Modify `vite.config.js` to use `vite-plugin-node-polyfills`. > - Add `FolderPicker.svelte` for folder selection in route generation. > - **Utilities**: > - Implement OpenAPI parsing in `utils.ts` with `OpenApi` namespace. > - Add `generateHttpTriggerFromOpenApi()` in `utils.ts` for processing OpenAPI documents. > > This description was created by [](https://www.ellipsis.dev?ref=windmill-labs%2Fwindmill&utm_source=github&utm_medium=referral) for 6cd6d023bd1816c5f740f9959dece0b4b646756d. You can [customize](https://app.ellipsis.dev/windmill-labs/settings/summaries) this summary. It will automatically update as commits are pushed.
